Pesty Agent Skills

Shared skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini — one install, every agent.

Getting Started

  • Node.js installed
  • That's it — the repo is public, no GitHub account needed
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills -g

Skills

ann-handley

Apply Ann Handley's Everybody Writes framework to create or audit marketing content — blog posts, emails, homepages, About Us pages, social copy, or any customer-facing writing. Invoke when user says "use Ann Handley," "Everybody Writes," "apply the Handley framework," or asks for help with content voice, writing quality, or copy that needs to sound more human, or defining a brand voice. Not for structural/narrative frameworks (use the storybrand skill for that).

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 4 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "ann-handley" -g

brand-identity

Use when creating or auditing a brand identity for a Pesty pest-control client: building brand guidelines, positioning, color/visual direction, a brand presentation, or grading an existing brand against the Wheeler ideals. Triggers "make/build a brand identity for <client>", "brand guidelines for <client>", "audit <client>'s brand", "brand identity".

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 8 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "brand-identity" -g

buyer-personas

Use when building a buyer persona, customer persona, or ICP from real inputs — sales/discovery call transcripts (Fathom), win-loss interviews, surveys, reviews, CRM won/lost notes — and you want a decision-focused persona, not a demographic profile. Triggers like "make a buyer persona", "build a persona for <client/segment>", "turn these call transcripts into a persona", "what drives these buyers". Applies the Kraus & Revella 5 Rings of Buying Insight method.

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 1 reference doc
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "buyer-personas" -g

pesty-frontend

Build or modify Pesty Marketing frontend — dashboards, internal tools, and client reports. Enforces the established dark navy design system (Epilogue + Montserrat, #001c28 background, CSS variable tokens). Use for Pesty dashboards, internal tools, and client reports. NOT for external client websites built in WordPress.

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 2 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "pesty-frontend" -g

storybrand

Apply the StoryBrand SB7 framework to create or evaluate customer-facing copy. Two modes — Write (homepage, landing page, email, ad, one-liner) and Audit (review existing copy against SB7 checklist). Invoke when user says "use StoryBrand," "SB7," "apply the framework," or requests help with brand messaging, homepage copy, or marketing copy where narrative structure matters. Not for blog posts, SEO articles, or general writing.

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 4 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "storybrand" -g

storytelling

Apply Will Storr's Science of Storytelling framework (Sacred Flaw, theory of control, dramatic question, change-driven openings) to long-form narrative copy where engagement matters more than direct-response structure. Two modes — Write (founder narrative, brand story, About page, case study, blog hook, long-form sales) and Audit (review existing narrative for character flaw, change, curiosity gap, transformation arc). Invoke when user says "use Storr," "Science of Storytelling," "sacred flaw," "make this more compelling," or requests help with founder stories, About pages, case studies, brand origin, or any narrative where character + transformation is the point. Not for homepages, ad headlines, or scan-first marketing surfaces — use the storybrand skill for those.

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 5 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "storytelling" -g

ui-design

Apply Master UI Design + Practical UI frameworks to build or audit interface designs (components, layouts, typography, color, forms, buttons, navigation, copywriting). Invoke when user says "use ui-design," "audit this UI," "review the design," or asks for help building/improving an interface, component, or screen. General-purpose (not Pesty-specific; use the pesty-frontend skill for that).

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
+ 8 reference docs
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "ui-design" -g

yt-structure

Use when turning a YouTube video, talk, podcast, or web article into a clean, citable Markdown document for an LLM knowledge library or RAG/OKF bundle — triggers like "transcribe and structure this video", "structure this transcript", "add this talk/article to the library". Covers pulling captions, faithful structuring, and editor's-note / [?] flagging.

Claude CodeCursorCodexGemini CLI
npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "yt-structure" -g

Source: github.com/Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills — add new skills there, not in ~/.claude/skills.
